summary: Frontend testing BLOCKED - PostgreSQL NOT INSTALLED. Code review confirms ALL 3 requested features are correctly implemented: (1) title-toolbar spacing reduced to 2px margin, (2) save layout persistence via localStorage → Python → PostgreSQL flow, (3) no regression in edit/normal modes.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL NOT INSTALLED in environment. Connection refused at localhost:5432. Streamlit app shows 'Erro de conexão com banco de dados' and stops.

feature_1_espaco_titulo_toolbar_reduzido.verdict: PASS - Minimal 2px bottom margin, tight 1.15 line-height removes space between title and toolbar

flow.step_1_js_store: Lines 2082-2098: guardarPosicaoPendente() stores {id: {x, y}} in localStorage with fallback (parent/local)
flow.step_2_drag_trigger: Lines 2162-2178: mouseup event calls guardarPosicaoPendente() after container drag
flow.step_4_persist_db: Lines 1792-1832: Parses JSON, iterates contentores, calls atualizar_posicao_contentor()
flow.step_5_sql_update: Lines 1122-1139: atualizar_posicao_contentor() executes UPDATE contentores SET x=%s, y=%s WHERE id=%s

feature_2_salvar_layout_persiste_posicoe.verdict: PASS - Complete flow: drag → localStorage → rerun → read localStorage → UPDATE PostgreSQL → clear localStorage

locations.click_handler: Lines 2136-2139: if (isEditMode) return; openInventory(cont); - Only opens inventory in normal mode
locations.drag_handler: Lines 2122-2134: if (!isEditMode) return; - Only enables drag in edit mode
locations.button_ui_toggle: Lines 1737-1760: Shows Salvar layout/Cancelar in edit mode, Editar mapa in normal mode

feature_3_sem_regressao_modo_editar_norm.verdict: PASS - No regression, edit mode enables drag and disables click, normal mode enables click and disables drag

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Title-toolbar spacing: margin:0 0 2px 0 with line-height:1.15 minimizes vertical gap
✅ Save layout persistence: Full localStorage → Python → PostgreSQL flow with fallback for iframe contexts
✅ Edit/Normal modes: CSS class toggle + event handler guards work correctly without regression
action_items: ENVIRONMENT: PostgreSQL must be installed or DATABASE_URL configured for functional testing
VISUAL VERIFICATION: Once DB is available, test container drag-and-save workflow visually

success_rate.frontend: CODE REVIEW ONLY - All 3 features verified in code

context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL is NOT INSTALLED (7th iteration with same blocker). All 3 requested features verified by code review: (1) Title-toolbar spacing reduced to margin:0 0 2px 0, (2) Save layout persistence uses localStorage → Python → PostgreSQL flow, (3) Edit/normal mode toggle via CSS class + event handlers. Functional testing requires PostgreSQL to be installed/configured.

environment_blocker.error_message: connection to server at 'localhost' (127.0.0.1), port 5432 failed: Connection refused
environment_blocker.resolution: Install PostgreSQL or configure DATABASE_URL environment variable to external PostgreSQL instance
